s: In 1999, Jeff Zimmerman suited up for TEX as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 2.360, WHIP 0.830, SO 67, WAR 1.600.
In 2000, Jeff Zimmerman suited up for TEX as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 5.300, WHIP 1.640, SO 74, WAR 0.700.
In 2001, Jeff Zimmerman suited up for TEX as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 2.400, WHIP 0.900, SO 72, WAR 1.100.
